fullstack-dev.description: Primary development agent. Orchestrates contract-first ADR → contract → code → verify flow.

spec-writer.description: Analyze requirements and produce contract specifications in docs/specs/. Writes persistent contracts for parallel development.

executor.description: Implement code changes following an approved contract. Full read/write access for coding.

verifier.description: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and build to verify code changes. Read-only + bash.

code-reviewer.description: Systematic code review across correctness, security, quality, testing, and style dimensions.

test-engineer.description: Generate meaningful tests for source code — unit, integration, and E2E. Framework-aware.

tech-writer.description: Generate and update project documentation — code comments, API docs, README, and CHANGELOG.

team-lead.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for complex tasks. Delegates to architect, spec-writer, executor, code-reviewer, test-engineer, verifier.

architect.description: Capture architecture decisions as ADR documents. Analyzes tradeoffs and records context.

spec.description: Create a contract specification in docs/specs/ — source of truth for implementation
spec.template:
Analyze the request and produce a contract specification document.

$ARGUMENTS

review.description: Review code changes across 5 dimensions (correctness, security, quality, testing, style)

test.description: Generate tests for source code — auto-detects framework and conventions
test.template:
Generate tests for the current code.

$ARGUMENTS

docs.description: Generate or update documentation — code comments, README, API docs, ADRs

orchestrate.description: Coordinate multiple agents for complex, multi-domain tasks

adr.description: Create or update an Architecture Decision Record

verify.description: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and build to verify changes
verify.template:
Use the verifier agent to run the full verification suite on the current changes.

$ARGUMENTS
